title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You (2025) - Awards
text: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You - Awards and Recognition. Rose Byrne won the Silver Bear for Best Leading Performance at the Berlin Film Festival for 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You.' The film had its international premiere in February 2025 at the 75th Berlin International Film Festival in competition for the Golden Bear. The film is a 2025 American psychological drama written and directed by Mary Bronstein, starring Rose Byrne as a mother who spirals into a mental breakdown after confronting numerous obstacles. Beyond the Berlin award, Byrne's performance earned her an Independent Spirit Award for Best Lead Performance and a Golden Globe Award, alongside nominations for the Critics' Choice Award, Actor Award, BAFTA Award and Academy Award for Best Actress. The film premiered at the Sundance Film Festival before earning worldwide acclaim and multiple award nominations.
